stemHtml:
During dispatch, you perform the mass and balance calculations. Given the following information, calculate the BEM arm in Inches aft of the datum.

Basic Empty Mass: 2635 lb 
Basic Empty Mass Moment: 204 397.5 in lb 
Front Seat Occupant's Mass: 93 lb 
Front Seat Occupant's Arm: 78 in 
Aft Seat Occupant's Mass: 186 lb 
Aft Seat Occupant's Arm: 119 in 
Block Fuel: 850 lb 
Taxi Fuel: 320 lb 
Fuel Arm: 83 in
